name: OpenAI
description: OpenAI provides large language models (GPT-4o, GPT-4, GPT-3.5), text embeddings, image generation (DALL-E 3), video generation (Sora), audio transcription, translation and speech synthesis (Whisper, TTS), content moderation, fine-tuning, batch processing, and file management through a comprehensive REST API.

capabilities.name: chat_completion_create
capabilities.description: Generate a chat completion from a conversation of messages. Supports system, user, and assistant roles, tool use, JSON mode, vision, and streaming.

capabilities.name: embedding_create
capabilities.description: Generate vector embeddings for text input, useful for semantic search, clustering, and similarity comparisons.

capabilities.name: image_generate
capabilities.description: Generate images from text prompts using DALL-E 3. Supports multiple sizes, styles, and quality settings.

capabilities.name: image_edit
capabilities.description: Edit an existing image by providing a prompt describing the desired changes, with optional mask for targeted editing.

capabilities.name: audio_transcription_create
capabilities.description: Transcribe audio files to text using the Whisper model. Supports multiple languages and output formats.

capabilities.name: audio_translation_create
capabilities.description: Translate audio from any supported language into English text using the Whisper model.

capabilities.name: audio_speech_create
capabilities.description: Convert text to natural-sounding speech audio using TTS models. Supports multiple voices and output formats.

capabilities.name: moderation_create
capabilities.description: Check text content against OpenAI's content policy to detect harmful or unsafe content across multiple categories.

capabilities.name: models_list
capabilities.description: List all available models including their IDs, ownership, and permissions.

capabilities.name: model_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details about a specific model by its ID.

capabilities.name: files_list
capabilities.description: List all files uploaded to the OpenAI platform, including their purpose, size, and creation date.

capabilities.name: file_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a file for use with fine-tuning, batch processing, or assistants.

capabilities.name: file_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve metadata about a specific uploaded file by its ID.

capabilities.name: file_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an uploaded file by its ID.

capabilities.name: file_content_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the contents of an uploaded file.

capabilities.name: fine_tuning_job_create
capabilities.description: Create a fine-tuning job to customize a model with your training data.

capabilities.name: fine_tuning_jobs_list
capabilities.description: List all fine-tuning jobs in your organization.

capabilities.name: fine_tuning_job_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the status and details of a specific fine-tuning job.

capabilities.name: fine_tuning_job_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an in-progress fine-tuning job.

capabilities.name: batch_create
capabilities.description: Create a batch job to process multiple API requests asynchronously at reduced cost.

capabilities.name: batches_list
capabilities.description: List all batch jobs in your organization.

capabilities.name: batch_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the status and details of a specific batch job.

capabilities.name: batch_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an in-progress batch job.
